what_it_does: Synthesizes the Phase A structure and model for turning the Company's proposed mobile application demos into a single real interactive application face, listing recovered intent, screen archetypes, interaction primitives, and a plan to scale from one proven template to nineteen demos.
observations: Recovered original directive: an interactive standalone HTML mockup of the proposed mobile information architecture, with 4 tabs — BOARD / TALK / QUEUE / TUNE — and the principle 'SURFACE EVERYTHING' under a gold/warm-charcoal scenario-player aesthetic.
The face uses the Gallery/DNA look and combines a visual interface surface with an embedded-AI interaction layer that sees the surface and acts live.
Maps demo screens as archetypes: HOME, COMPOSE, PIECE, CANVAS/HUB, FLOW, SHEET/LEDGER, COMPONENTS, STATES, and DASHBOARD.
Defines a self-build interaction circuit: click an element → direct/annotate/talk → the brain generates/mutates → write to the addressed registry → re-render.
Interaction primitives include navigate, select/drill, drive, act, annotate, talk, compose/generate, and hotspots.
Phase B is to prove the pattern on one screen using the v9 template, then scale to 19 demos, gated on Tim's v9 verdict.
Notes drift: app-canvas/app-flow/app-sheet/app-states use vars.css and local .phone classes instead of shared phone.css.
The v9 template still needs a 'composition's editorial-VOICE transform' before it can be inherited by all screens.
standouts: The recovered 4-tab IA (BOARD/TALK/QUEUE/TUNE) and 'SURFACE EVERYTHING' principle.
The address-driven self-build circuit that binds every clickable element to annotation and an embedded AI brain.
Phase A is explicitly a structure/model synthesis; the actual build is gated on finishing the v9 template and receiving Tim's verdict.
conventions: Uses markdown headings and bullet lists to organize intent, structure, model, and build plan.
Labels each screen with a scr-/app- prefix plus a short tagline.
Mixes design vocabulary (DNA, Gallery, scenario-player, gold/warm-charcoal) with build vocabulary (v9, Phase A/B, registry, data-anchorable).
References external documents and artifacts (GALLERY_AS_FACE.md, 49-PIECES-MAP, taxonomies.json) without quoting their contents.
Explicitly flags a drift from the shared phone.css convention.
concerns: Heavy reliance on external context not present in the file: session-history scans, recollection, kimi era-clones, the v9 template, and the 49-PIECES-MAP.
Phase A blends recovered intent, design taxonomy, and build planning in one document, so the boundary between discovery and decision is unclear.
The plan says 'scale to 19' but only nine archetype screens are listed, and the mapping is not explained.
The drift note identifies unification debt but the remediation plan is just a one-line 'UNIFY' item.
notes: A design-build synthesis that maps the recovered mobile IA, demo-screen archetypes, and an addressable AI interaction circuit into a single scaling plan.
questions: What are the exact 19 demos and how do they map to the nine listed archetypes?
What is the current state of the v9 template and what specifically is the 'composition's editorial-VOICE transform'?
What is the registry format and addressing scheme for element annotations and AI mutations?
What content belongs under each of the BOARD/TALK/QUEUE/TUNE tabs beyond their names?
Who or what are the 'kimi era-clones' and what deliverables are expected from them?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is Phase A structure+model synthesis; the file does synthesize recovered intent, archetype structure, interaction model, and build plan, so it matches.
apparent_themes: Gallery as the single application face.
intention_signals: To define a unified interactive application face where every element is addressable, annotatable, and talk-to-able, and to plan the conversion of existing static demo screens into one real interactive prototype.
novelty: The idea of binding an embedded AI brain to every addressable surface element so the interface itself becomes a drivable, self-mutating application face, combined with a recovered 4-tab IA and a scenario-player aesthetic.
contribution: A design-and-build synthesis that connects a recovered 4-tab mobile IA, a catalog of demo-screen archetypes, and an address-based AI interaction circuit into a single scaling plan for an interactive application face.
summary_for_embedding: Phase A synthesis document mapping recovered intent, screen archetypes, an address-driven AI interaction model, and a prove-one-then-scale plan for a Gallery-faced interactive mobile application prototype.
intention_for_embedding: Intended to align the team on the full interactive application face before proving it on one screen and scaling to nineteen demos.
